title: Pearls++
description: Adds a bunch of custom ender pearls.
body:
## Rquirements
You only need Fabric API
## About
What if you didn't have to wait for the ender pearl to teleport you? What if there was a pearl that instantly teleported you? Well now there is. We call this the fast pearl, because it instantly teleports you without the ark.
### Discord: [https://discord.gg/cwTNRAyban](https://discord.gg/cwTNRAyban)

## Features
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Fast Pearl:
Instantly teleports you with no ark.
### Pull Pearl:
Pulls whatever it hits towards you. (Only works on entities)
### Swap Pearl:
Swap places with whatever it hits. (Only works on entities)
### Rideable Pearl:
You ride the pearl instead of it teleporting you.
### No Cooldown Pearl:
It has no cooldown.
### Effect Pearls:
There is one pearl for each positive effect. they give you that effect when you throw them.
</details>
